name: a namespace revealed as non-committed at stage zero can be promoted to in-scope via stack-add
command: B=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["full_surface"].find{|e|e["namespace"]=="helm"}["activated"]'); A=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a credentialing platform" --stack-add helm --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); e=c["full_surface"].find{|x|x["namespace"]=="helm"}; puts (e["activated"]==true && e["via"]=="stack" && c["workload_classification"]["namespaces"].include?("helm")).to_s'); [ "$B" = "false" ] && [ "$A" = "true" ] && echo reveal-then-promote 1>&2
